heading: Warnung vs Warraber Islet — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Warnung, Queensland and Warraber Islet, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Warraber Islet has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Warnung (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Warnung or Warraber Islet safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Warnung has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Warraber Islet scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Warnung scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Warraber Islet scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Warnung or Warraber Islet?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Warraber Islet has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
